final:
module top_module(y,a,b,c,d,s1,s0);output y;
input a,b,c,d,s1,s0;
assign y = ((a & ~s1 & ~s0) | (b & ~s1 & s0) | (c & s1 & ~s0) | (d & s1 & s0));  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      y <= a; if (s1 == 1'b0 && s0 == 1'b0) begin y <= b; end else if (s1 == 1'b1 && s0 == 1'b0) begin y <= c; end else if (s1 == 1'b0 && s0 == 1'b1) begin y <= d; end
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: y <= a; if (s1 == 1'b0 && s0 == 1'b0) begin y <= b; end else if (s1 == 1'b1 && s0 == 1'b0) begin y <= c; end else if (s1 == 1'b0 && s0 == 1'b1) begin y <= d; end
